meta.title: The "Special Relationship" and Brexit: The US-UK Alliance in the Trump Era
meta.description: Peter Rough, Brendan Brown, Samantha Job, and Ted Bromund discuss the future of UK-EU trade negotiations after Brexit and the US-UK relationship.
